heading: Organization
text: An organization.

heading: Agent
text: An agent (eg. person, group, software or physical artifact).

heading: OnlineChatAccount
text: An online chat account.

heading: LabelProperty
text: A foaf:LabelProperty is any RDF property with texual values that serve as labels.

heading: Project
text: A project (a collective endeavour of some kind).

heading: Group
text: A class of Agents.

heading: OnlineGamingAccount
text: An online gaming account.

heading: Person
text: A person.

heading: PersonalProfileDocument
text: A personal profile RDF document.

heading: OnlineAccount
text: An online account.

heading: Image
text: An image.

heading: OnlineEcommerceAccount
text: An online e-commerce account.

heading: Document
text: A document.

heading: mbox
text: A  personal mailbox, ie. an Internet mailbox associated with exactly one owner, the first owner of this mailbox. This is a 'static inverse functional property', in that  there is (across time and change) at most one individual that ever has any particular value for foaf:mbox.

heading: based_near
text: A location that something is based near, for some broadly human notion of near.

heading: phone
text: A phone,  specified using fully qualified tel: URI scheme (refs: http://www.w3.org/Addressing/schemes.html#tel).

heading: homepage
text: A homepage for some thing.

heading: weblog
text: A weblog of some thing (whether person, group, company etc.).

heading: openid
text: An OpenID for an Agent.

heading: tipjar
text: A tipjar document for this agent, describing means for payment and reward.

heading: made
text: Something that was made by this agent.

heading: maker
text: An agent that  made this thing.

heading: img
text: An image that can be used to represent some thing (ie. those depictions which are particularly representative of something, eg. one's photo on a homepage).

heading: depiction
text: A depiction of some thing.

heading: depicts
text: A thing depicted in this representation.

heading: thumbnail
text: A derived thumbnail image.

heading: workplaceHomepage
text: A workplace homepage of some person; the homepage of an organization they work for.

heading: workInfoHomepage
text: A work info homepage of some person; a page about their work for some organization.

heading: schoolHomepage
text: A homepage of a school attended by the person.

heading: knows
text: A person known by this person (indicating some level of reciprocated interaction between the parties).

heading: interest
text: A page about a topic of interest to this person.

heading: topic_interest
text: A thing of interest to this person.

heading: publications
text: A link to the publications of this person.

heading: currentProject
text: A current project this person works on.

heading: pastProject
text: A project this person has previously worked on.

heading: fundedBy
text: An organization funding a project or person.

heading: logo
text: A logo representing some thing.

heading: topic
text: A topic of some page or document.

heading: primaryTopic
text: The primary topic of some page or document.

heading: focus
text: The underlying or 'focal' entity associated with some SKOS-described concept.

heading: page
text: A page or document about this thing.

heading: theme
text: A theme.

heading: account
text: Indicates an account held by this agent.

heading: holdsAccount
text: Indicates an account held by this agent.

heading: accountServiceHomepage
text: Indicates a homepage of the service provide for this online account.

heading: member
text: Indicates a member of a Group

heading: mbox_sha1sum
text: The sha1sum of the URI of an Internet mailbox associated with exactly one owner, the  first owner of the mailbox.

heading: gender
text: The gender of this Agent (typically but not necessarily 'male' or 'female').

heading: geekcode
text: A textual geekcode for this person, see http://www.geekcode.com/geek.html

heading: dnaChecksum
text: A checksum for the DNA of some thing. Joke.

heading: sha1
text: A sha1sum hash, in hex.

heading: title
text: Title (Mr, Mrs, Ms, Dr. etc)

heading: nick
text: A short informal nickname characterising an agent (includes login identifiers, IRC and other chat nicknames).

heading: jabberID
text: A jabber ID for something.

heading: aimChatID
text: An AIM chat ID

heading: skypeID
text: A Skype ID

heading: icqChatID
text: An ICQ chat ID

heading: yahooChatID
text: A Yahoo chat ID

heading: msnChatID
text: An MSN chat ID

heading: name
text: A name for some thing.

heading: firstName
text: The first name of a person.

heading: lastName
text: The last name of a person.

heading: givenName
text: The given name of some person.

heading: surname
text: The surname of some person.

heading: family_name
text: The family name of some person.

heading: familyName
text: The family name of some person.

heading: plan
text: A .plan comment, in the tradition of finger and '.plan' files.

heading: myersBriggs
text: A Myers Briggs (MBTI) personality classification.

heading: accountName
text: Indicates the name (identifier) associated with this online account.

heading: birthday
text: The birthday of this Agent, represented in mm-dd string form, eg. '12-31'.

heading: age
text: The age in years of some agent.

heading: status
text: A string expressing what the user is happy for the general public (normally) to know about their current activity.
